name: Pineapple Filling
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
1. Combine the flour and sugar in a small saucepan.
2. Add the pineapple and butter to the saucepan.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Allow the mixture to cool.
Yield: 2-2/3 cups.
